subcodes.first_line: O Husayn! Thou visitest Hussein and slayest Hussein. O thou heedless and doubting one! Verily, We desired thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسین تزور الحسین و تقتل الحسین یا ایها الغافل المرتاب انا اردنا حضورک
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
